words.definition: An electronic gadget such as a phone, tablet, or computer
words.example: My device ran out of battery during the meeting.

words.definition: Programs and applications that run on a computer or device
words.example: Make sure you update your software regularly for security.

words.definition: A secret word or code used to gain access to a system
words.example: Never share your password with anyone.

words.definition: A program used to access and navigate the internet
words.example: Chrome and Firefox are the most popular web browsers.

words.definition: To transfer data from your device to the internet or a server
words.example: I need to upload the document to the shared folder.

words.definition: To transfer data from the internet or a server to your device
words.example: You can download the app for free from the store.

words.definition: Using radio signals instead of cables to transmit data
words.example: The hotel offers free wireless internet throughout the building.

words.definition: An alert or message sent by an app or system to your device
words.example: I turned off all notifications to focus on my work.

words.definition: A newer version of software that fixes problems or adds features
words.example: The latest security update fixed several critical bugs.

words.definition: The space available to keep data on a device or in the cloud
words.example: I need more storage space for all my photos and videos.

words.definition: Able to work together with another system or device without problems
words.example: Check whether the software is compatible with your operating system.

words.definition: The amount of data that can be transferred over a network in a given time
words.example: Streaming videos in 4K requires a lot of bandwidth.

words.definition: The process of converting data into a secret code to protect it
words.example: End-to-end encryption keeps your messages private and secure.

words.definition: A set of step-by-step rules a computer follows to solve a problem
words.example: Social media platforms use algorithms to decide what content you see.

words.definition: Harmful software designed to damage systems or steal information
words.example: The antivirus program detected malware on the computer.
